title: mlos_bench LocalEnv config
description: Config instance for a mlos_bench LocalEnv

config.$comment: config objects need to specify their entire schema, so we need to include the unevaluatedProperties handling here.

$comment: NOTE: We only list unique properties here. Others are inherited from the leaf-environment-subschema.json. Additionally, unevaluatedProperties handling is dealt with elsewhere.

local_env_config.$comment: Separated here without unevaluatedProperties=false so we can reuse for LocalFileShareEnv

temp_dir.description: Path to a temporary directory to use for storing intermediate files.

dump_params_file.description: Path to a file to dump the parameters to.

dump_meta_file.description: Path to a file to dump the tunables' metadata to.

read_results_file.description: Path to a file to read the results from.
read_results_file.$comment: Currently we only support CSV files.

read_telemetry_file.description: Path to a file to read the telemetry data from.
read_telemetry_file.$comment: Currently we only support CSV files.
